case_title: MARY E. LUTTRELL VS. CAROLYN BOSTICK

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTTRELL, MARY E. SERVED MAR-06-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE MAR-08-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTICK, CAROLYN  R/A - DAYONE BABY, LLC PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON APR-09-2018 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUTTRELL, MARY E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSTICK, CAROLYN  R/A - DAYONE BABY, LLC $14,308.25 PRINCIPAL, $86.95 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,765.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTTRELL, MARY E. AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTICK, CAROLYN  R/A - DAYONE BABY, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
